## Problem

What problem does this solve? Example: "My AGENTS.md has X pattern that isn't caught..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the rule or feature you'd like added.

## Example

Show an example AGENTS.md snippet that should trigger this check.

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples.
